title: astragalus wootonii var. wootonii
intro: Astragalus wootonii var. wootonii, also known as Wooton's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States. It is an herbaceous plant used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Astragalus wootonii var. wootonii include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being, making it beneficial for health conditions such as fatigue, anemia, and respiratory issues. Astragalus wootonii var. wootonii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support immune system health and promote vitality.
